gauge.name: Alabama River at Henry Lock and Dam

impacts.statement: There is considerable flooding in Autaugaville. In addition...most of Benton is flooded at this level.
Most of Benton Road from US 80 to Edsons is flooded. County Road 15 from the Lock to Days Bend floods.
Sections of Benton Road off of US Hwy 80 are flooded.
In Benton, Calhoun and Church Street are flooded. Sections of 1st through 4th Streets are flooded along with sections of Commerce and Market Streets.
Portions of Autaugaville begin to flood. In addition...sections of the western railway of Alabama Railroad begin to flood at this level. At 135 feet considerable flooding occurs in Benton.
Portions of Benton begin to flood. Numerous house trailers along the river become flooded if not moved to higher ground.
Sections of Praire Creek Campground will begin to flood as water rises to stages of 130 to 135.
Widespread flooding of farm lands and some homes and trailers along the river occurs.

hydronotes.statement: River forecasts for this location take into account past precipitation and the precipitation amounts expected approximately 48 hours into the future from the forecast issuance time.
